The '''Orbot''' was a model of [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] manufactured by [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc.|Serv-O-Droid]] during the last [[Standard century/Legends|century]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. This unit proved to be quite popular in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], where beings were not as wealthy as their counterparts in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. When Serv-O-Droid learned that [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] had produced its [[5YQ-series protocol droid]] with components from the Orbot, they took the larger corporation to court and eventually won their case. This forced Cybot Galactica to halt production of the 5YQ series.
